message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox

actor Client
participant "Service A" as SA
participant "Service B" as SB

Client -> SA : GET /service-a/concept/1
activate SA
SA --> Client : 301 Redirect: /service-b/concept/1
deactivate SA

Client -> SB : GET /service-b/concept/1
activate SB
SB --> Client : 200 OK: <object>
deactivate SB

@enduml
```
